name: text_to_speech
description: Convert text to speech using Groq's TTS model and save the output audio file to a given directory.

text.description: The text to convert to speech (maximum 10,000 characters)

voice.description: The voice to use for the audio generation

output_directory.description: Directory where files should be saved (defaults to $HOME/Desktop if not provided)

name: list_voices
description: List all available voices for Groq's TTS models.

model.description: Specify which model's voices to list

name: transcribe_audio
description: Transcribe speech from an audio file using Groq's speech-to-text API and save the output text file to a given directory.

input_file_path.description: Path to the audio file to transcribe

model.description: The model to use for transcription

prompt.description: Optional prompt to guide the model's style or specify how to spell unfamiliar words

temperature.description: Controls randomness in the model's output (0.0 recommended for STT)

output_directory.description: Directory where files should be saved

save_to_file.description: Whether to save the transcript to a file

name: translate_audio
description: Translate speech from an audio file to English text using Groq's speech-to-text API.

input_file_path.description: Path to the audio file to translate

model.description: The model to use for translation

prompt.description: Optional prompt to guide the model's style

temperature.description: Controls randomness in the model's output

output_directory.description: Directory where files should be saved

save_to_file.description: Whether to save the translation to a file

name: list_stt_models
description: List all available models for Groq's STT service.

name: analyze_image
description: Analyze an image using Groq's vision API with either Scout (default) or Maverick model and generate descriptive text.

image.description: Path to the image file to analyze, a resource reference, base64-encoded image data, or raw image buffer

prompt.description: Text prompt describing what you want to know about the image

temperature.description: Controls randomness in the model's output (0.0-1.0)

max_tokens.description: Maximum number of tokens to generate in the response

output_directory.description: Optional directory to save output file

save_to_file.description: Whether to save the description to a file

name: analyze_image_json
description: Analyze an image using Groq's vision API and generate a structured JSON response.

image.description: Path to the image file, base64-encoded image data, or raw image buffer

prompt.description: Text prompt describing what you want to know about the image
prompt.default: Extract key information from this image as JSON

temperature.description: Controls randomness in the model's output (0.0-1.0)

max_tokens.description: Maximum number of tokens to generate in the response

output_directory.description: Optional directory to save output file

save_to_file.description: Whether to save the JSON response to a file

name: chat_completion
description: Generate a chat completion using Groq's API.

messages.description: List of message dictionaries with 'role' and 'content' keys

model.description: The model to use for completion

top_p.description: Alternative to temperature for nucleus sampling

presence_penalty.description: Penalize tokens based on presence (-2.0 to 2.0)

output_directory.description: Optional directory to save output file

save_to_file.description: Whether to save the response to a file

name: list_chat_models
description: List all available models for Groq's chat completion service.

name: play_audio
description: Play an audio file using the system's audio output. Supports WAV and other common audio formats.

input_file_path.description: Path to the audio file to play

name: get_groq_documentation_full
description: Fetch and return the complete Groq LLM documentation.

name: get_groq_documentation_summary
description: Fetch and return the concise summary of Groq LLM documentation.

name: batch_process
description: Process a batch of requests using Groq's Batch API. Supports both JSONL files and arrays of requests.

requests.description: Either a path to a JSONL file or a list of request dictionaries

completion_window.description: Time window for batch completion (e.g., '24h' or '7d')

name: batch_status
description: Check the status of a Groq batch processing job.

batch_id.description: The ID of the batch job to check

name: batch_results
description: Retrieve results from a completed Groq batch job.

file_id.description: The output file ID from the completed batch

output_path.description: Optional custom path to save results

name: list_batches
description: List all active Groq batch processing jobs.

name: compound_tool
description: Use Groq's Compound-Beta API for advanced AI tasks involving web search and code execution.

messages.description: List of message dictionaries with 'role' and 'content' keys

model.description: The compound model to use (compound-beta-mini, compound-beta, or compound-beta-deep)

save_to_file.description: Whether to save the response to a file
